mapper.select: SELECT c.code AS countryCode, c.name AS countryName, ci.name AS cityName, a.code AS airportCode, a.name AS airportName FROM country c JOIN city ci ON ci.country_id = c.id JOIN airport a ON a.city_id = ci.id ORDER BY c.name, ci.name, a.name
SELECT id FROM airport WHERE code = #{code}

SELECT b.source_id AS sourceId, b.route, b.destination, b.operator, b.duration, b.price, b.last_updated AS lastUpdated, b.fetch_failed AS fetchFailed FROM bus_route b JOIN airport a ON a.id = b.airport_id WHERE a.code = #{code} ORDER BY b.route

SELECT id, source_id AS sourceId, route, destination, operator, official_url AS officialUrl, duration, price, operating_hours AS operatingHours, last_updated AS lastUpdated, fetch_failed AS fetchFailed FROM bus_route WHERE source_id = #{sourceId}
SELECT id FROM bus_route WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT a.name AS airportName, ci.name AS cityName FROM bus_route b JOIN airport a ON a.id = b.airport_id JOIN city ci ON ci.id = a.city_id WHERE b.source_id = #{sourceId} AND b.deleted = 0
SELECT name FROM bus_stop WHERE bus_route_id = #{busId} ORDER BY seq
SELECT time_range AS timeRange, interval_text AS intervalText, note FROM bus_schedule WHERE bus_route_id = #{busId} ORDER BY id
SELECT url, caption FROM bus_image WHERE bus_route_id = #{busId} ORDER BY id
SELECT name, url FROM bus_file WHERE bus_route_id = #{busId} ORDER BY id
SELECT type, message, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate FROM bus_alert WHERE bus_route_id = #{busId} ORDER BY id

SELECT a.code, a.name, ci.name AS cityName, co.code AS countryCode FROM airport a JOIN city ci ON ci.id = a.city_id JOIN country co ON co.id = ci.country_id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND (a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR a.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR ci.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ORDER BY a.name LIMIT 10

SELECT b.source_id AS sourceId, b.route, b.destination, a.code AS airportCode, MIN(s.name) AS matchedStop FROM bus_stop s JOIN bus_route b ON b.id = s.bus_route_id JOIN airport a ON a.id = b.airport_id WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND b.deleted = 0 AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') GROUP BY b.source_id, b.route, b.destination, a.code ORDER BY b.source_id LIMIT 10
